creator: jiri@navratil.cz
text:
The oce driver need line

	   oce_load="YES"

in /boot/loader.conf 

but man page

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=oce&sektion=4&manpath=FreeBSD+10.1-RELEASE

have state

	   if_oce_load="YES"

which is not working.

Please change if_oce_load="YES" to oce_load="YES"
